name: Taylor Lane Organic Coffee
tagline: Taylor Lane offers 100% premium organic coffee and teas in our store and online
seoDescription: Taylor Lane offers 100% premium organic coffee and teas in our store and online! Learn more about our organic coffee beans and find a premium roast today!

sections.heading: Taylor Lane Organic Coffee, serving Sebastopol, CA since 1993
sections.subheading: Keeping the sustainable spirit of Sonoma County alive in small-batch roasts packaged by hand

sections.heading: About Taylor Lane Organic Coffee
body: Keeping the sustainable spirit of Sonoma County alive in small-batch roasts packaged by hand

Taylor Lane is a roaster that believes in community, sustainability, and experimentation. Every small batch is roasted in our Loring Smart Roast, a locally made (Santa Rosa, CA) and energy efficient roaster that greatly reduces our carbon footprint without sacrificing quality. We aim to bring together the artistry and science of roasting in our offerings, which range from light and fruity to dark and bold.

sections.heading: Hungry yet?
sections.body: Find us at 6790 McKinley Ave Ste 170. Call (707) 634-7129 — we’re glad to help.
